## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up and explore potential collaboration between augmentcode.com and growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (growthx.ai) has pivoted from no-code to a coding agent platform, raised a $12M Series A, and grown to 60 people with 50 clients](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Sylvain's company (augmentcode.com) has transitioned to a PLG model, seeing strong activation rates despite friction points](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Both companies are navigating rapid growth in the AI space, facing challenges in scaling and market positioning](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Potential collaboration discussed to help augmentcode.com scale user acquisition and market presence](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

## Topics

### Company Updates: growthx.ai

  - [Pivoted from no-code (Aerofs) to building a coding agent platform](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A in 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Grown to 60 employees, 50 clients, $7M+ revenue](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Focusing on content, editorial, and programmatic services](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Building a platform to translate knowledge work into scalable code](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Challenges in packaging services and balancing high-end consultancy with repeatable workflows](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

### Company Updates: augmentcode.com

  - [Transitioned from sales-led to product-led growth (PLG) model](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Seeing thousands of signups daily with 63% activation rate](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Target audience: experienced developers who know Git](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Positioning as superior to competitors (e.g., Cursor) for large codebases](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Current growth primarily through word-of-mouth and influencer mentions](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### Market Dynamics and Challenges

  - [Rapid AI market evolution causing daily shifts in strategy](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Difficulty in hiring top talent without VC backing](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Balancing service delivery with platform development](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Navigating competition (e.g., Cursor, Windsurf) and market positioning](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Growth Strategies for augmentcode.com

  - [Aim to 10x top-of-funnel volume](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Explore SEO and content marketing opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Increase paid advertising budget (currently $300K/month with room for growth)](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Target JetBrains ecosystem (11M users) through influencer marketing and social media engagement](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Capitalize on Windsurf's acquisition by OpenAI to attract users](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to sync with his CTO and send a proposal for a 60-day, $30K engagement](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Focus on deep analysis and strategy development for augmentcode.com's growth](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss proposal and potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Explore ways to rapidly deploy strategies given the fast-moving AI market](https://fathom.video/share/dz4a-TLf5yqxBuJCaaBzSKo4nx4-Av5F?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
